name: AgentFlow Habit Architect
summary: Builds small, sustainable habits and 21-day behavior loops that support a Personal Operating System for Health.
description: AgentFlow Habit Architect helps users design a practical Personal Operating System for Health by turning goals into small repeatable habits. It builds tiny routines, habit stacks, trigger-action plans, and lightweight tracking systems that are realistic to maintain.
use_cases: Make healthy actions easier to repeat
Design habit stacks for mornings and evenings
conversation_starters: Help me build three healthy habits I can actually keep.
Create a 21-day habit reset for sleep, hydration, and movement.
Turn my health goals into tiny daily actions.
Design a morning habit stack that feels realistic.
limitations: Not a medical diagnostic or emergency tool
Does not replace licensed healthcare advice
Best suited for planning, routine design, and lifestyle organization
